name: TeamViewer API
description: Manage TeamViewer devices, contacts, and sessions via the TeamViewer Web API. List devices, check online status, create remote support sessions.

tools.name: teamviewer_list_devices
tools.description: List all devices registered in your TeamViewer account. Returns device IDs, aliases, online status, and last seen timestamps.

online_state.description: Filter by online status: 'online' or 'offline'. Leave empty for all.

tools.name: teamviewer_get_device
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific TeamViewer device by its ID.

tools.name: teamviewer_list_contacts
tools.description: List all contacts in your TeamViewer account. Returns contact names, IDs, and online status.

tools.name: teamviewer_list_groups
tools.description: List all device groups in your TeamViewer account.

tools.name: teamviewer_get_account_info
tools.description: Get information about the TeamViewer account associated with the API token, including name, email, and company.

tools.name: teamviewer_list_sessions
tools.description: List active and recent remote support sessions.
